creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I do not understand the problem. Could you provide more detail about system environment and build logs?

On my own box, I have DOCS turned off globally.

% grep OPTIONS /etc/make.conf
OPTIONS_UNSET=DEBUG DOCS DOXYGEN EXAMPLES GUI NLS X11

% grep m4 /usr/local/etc/ports.conf
devel/m4 : OPTIONS_SET=LIBSIGSEGV

% cd /usr/ports/devel/m4

% make build-depends-list
/usr/ports/devel/libsigsegv
/usr/ports/print/texinfo

Note that we have USES=makeinfo in the Makefile. It will add print/texinfo to BUILD_DEPENDS. 

% grep makeinfo Makefile
CONFIGURE_ENV=  MAKEINFO="makeinfo --no-split"
USES=           makeinfo tar:xz

from /usr/ports/Mk/Uses/makeinfo.mk:

.if !exists(/usr/bin/makeinfo)
BUILD_DEPENDS+= makeinfo:print/texinfo
.endif
